chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 1981 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on CMA 2811/2025 (u/A) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on statement dated 30.04.2025 4. For hearing of main case. 07.05.2025. Mr. Athar Hussain Abro Advocate by holding brief on behalf of Syed Zaffar Ali Shah counsel for petitioners under instructions does not wish to press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
